creator: Paul_Miseiko@rapid7.com
text:
The command "ipfw sched delete [number ...]" does not work.

How-To-Repeat: 11:25am root@teardrop-pts/4 [~/hg/etc] ipfw sched delete 1
ipfw: rule 1: setsockopt(IP_DUMMYNET_DEL): Invalid argument

Jul  7 11:25:28 <kern.crit> teardrop kernel: do_config  invalid delete type 3
